chunks.title: Realme-Buds-T500-Pro
chunks.text: So you can definitely call Realme Buds T500 Pro as game changer earbuds

chunks.title: Realme-Buds-T500-Pro
chunks.text: because the features that it is providing at around Rs 2,500

chunks.title: Realme-Buds-T500-Pro
chunks.text: at this time, others are not providing at all.

chunks.title: Realme-Buds-T500-Pro
chunks.text: First of all, we will talk about the look and feel.

chunks.title: Realme-Buds-T500-Pro
chunks.text: Here you will get a tech vegan leather finish.

chunks.title: Realme-Buds-T500-Pro
chunks.text: The case part is very compact.

chunks.title: Realme-Buds-T500-Pro
chunks.text: And the brand says that these are the world's first candy inspired earbuds.

chunks.title: Realme-Buds-T500-Pro
chunks.text: Along with that, you will get the lanyard in the box.

chunks.title: Realme-Buds-T500-Pro
chunks.text: You can hang it and move it anywhere.

chunks.title: Realme-Buds-T500-Pro
chunks.text: You will get the Buds in the shape of a stamp.

chunks.title: Realme-Buds-T500-Pro
chunks.text: It looks like a gold plated in the front.

chunks.title: Realme-Buds-T500-Pro
chunks.text: You will get a glass finish on the back.

chunks.title: Realme-Buds-T500-Pro
chunks.text: You will get a very secure fitting ear.

chunks.title: Realme-Buds-T500-Pro
chunks.text: LHGC 5.2 high edition codec support,

chunks.title: Realme-Buds-T500-Pro
chunks.text: triple device pairing option,

chunks.title: Realme-Buds-T500-Pro
chunks.text: in-ear detection feature,

chunks.title: Realme-Buds-T500-Pro
chunks.text: 50 decibel flagship noise cancellation feature.

chunks.title: Realme-Buds-T500-Pro
chunks.text: ANC mode works very well.

chunks.title: Realme-Buds-T500-Pro
chunks.text: There is no problem with transparency.

chunks.title: Realme-Buds-T500-Pro
chunks.text: And you can also customize the Realme app.

chunks.title: Realme-Buds-T500-Pro
chunks.text: It is set up with 6 mics with noise cancellation feature.

chunks.title: Realme-Buds-T500-Pro
chunks.text: I found the calling in normal and traffic conditions both to be very impressive.

chunks.title: Realme-Buds-T500-Pro
chunks.text: And the output is very well balanced.

chunks.title: Realme-Buds-T500-Pro
chunks.text: You will get a rich output.

chunks.title: Realme-Buds-T500-Pro
chunks.text: There will be no problem with clarity and vocals.

chunks.title: Realme-Buds-T500-Pro
chunks.text: You will get a very soft balanced bass.

chunks.title: Realme-Buds-T500-Pro
chunks.text: There is no extra powerful boosted bass.

chunks.title: Realme-Buds-T500-Pro
chunks.text: I definitely found these all-rounder earbuds according to the price point.

text: So you can definitely call Realme Buds T500 Pro as game changer earbuds because the features that it is providing at around Rs 2,500 at this time, others are not providing at all. First of all, we will talk about the look and feel. Here you will get a tech vegan leather finish. The case part is very compact. And the brand says that these are the world's first candy inspired earbuds. Along with that, you will get the lanyard in the box. You can hang it and move it anywhere. You will get the Buds in the shape of a stamp. It looks like a gold plated in the front. You will get a glass finish on the back. You will get a very secure fitting ear. LHGC 5.2 high edition codec support, triple device pairing option, in-ear detection feature, 50 decibel flagship noise cancellation feature. ANC mode works very well. There is no problem with transparency. And you can also customize the Realme app. It is set up with 6 mics with noise cancellation feature. I found the calling in normal and traffic conditions both to be very impressive. And the output is very well balanced. You will get a rich output. There will be no problem with clarity and vocals. You will get a very soft balanced bass. There is no extra powerful boosted bass. I definitely found these all-rounder earbuds according to the price point. The detailed heavy testing video of this has been live on our channel. Definitely check it out. And who do you want to compare it with? Do tell us in the comments. We will try and get it for you. And you will get the tagged products here. You can check out the current price. Don't forget to share this earbud with your friends. And subscribe for more such videos.
